title: Hut 8's Cryptocurrency Mining Upgrade Targets 66% Hashrate Growth by 2025
text: Hut 8 Mining Upgrade Details. Equipment: Acquiring 31,145 BITMAIN Antminer S21+ miners at $15.00 per terahash. Delivery expected early Q1 2025. Hashrate Growth: Increase self-mining capacity by 3.7 exahashes per second (EH/s). Brings total output to approximately 9.3 EH/s, representing 66% increase from current levels. Energy Efficiency: Power consumption improvement from 31.7 to 19.9 joules per terahash (J/TH), marking 37% improvement. Strategic Rationale: S21+ selected for faster payback period than more efficient models across range of future hashprice scenarios. CEO Asher Genoot: S21+ offers faster payback across wide band of hashprice scenarios. Future Expansion: Existing partnership option for approximately 15 EH/s of hosted ASIC miners at Vega site. Could enable company to reach 24 EH/s total self-mining capacity by Q2 2025 with average efficiency 15.7 J/TH.
